  1. io.bloviate.db

Uses of Record Class
io.bloviate.db.BulkLoadStrategy

Packages that use BulkLoadStrategy
Package
Description
io.bloviate.db
 

  • Uses of BulkLoadStrategy in io.bloviate.db

    Methods in io.bloviate.db that return BulkLoadStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BulkLoadStrategy
    DatabaseConfiguration.bulkLoadStrategy()
    Returns the value of the bulkLoadStrategy record component.
    static BulkLoadStrategy
    BulkLoadStrategy.ordered()
    The back-compatible default: fill in foreign-key dependency order, never disabling constraints.
    static BulkLoadStrategy
    BulkLoadStrategy.unorderedBulk()
    Disable foreign-key enforcement, fill every table concurrently with no topological barrier, then re-enable enforcement without re-validating (safe because the data is consistent by construction).
    Constructors in io.bloviate.db with parameters of type BulkLoadStrategy
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations, long seed, CommitStrategy commitStrategy, BulkLoadStrategy bulkLoadStrategy)
    Creates a configuration with the given base seed, CommitStrategy and BulkLoadStrategy, and no custom GeneratorRegistry.
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations, GeneratorRegistry generatorRegistry, long seed, CommitStrategy commitStrategy, BulkLoadStrategy bulkLoadStrategy)
    Normalizes a null commitStrategy to CommitStrategy.connectionDefault() and a null bulkLoadStrategy to BulkLoadStrategy.ordered() so the back-compatible behavior applies whenever a caller does not specify them.
